title: Display top # of items on reference board.
excerpt: I setup a dashboard to reference another dashboard of items related to orders. I would only like to display the top 5 items on the list instead of all the items as the original dashboard. The original dashboard is update…

posts.author: nbarcenas (Nick Barcenas)
posts.cookedHtml: I setup a dashboard to reference another dashboard of items related to orders. I would only like to display the top 5 items on the list instead of all the items as the original dashboard. The original dashboard is updated daily but I only want to see the top 5 of whatever is at the top of the list when it is updated so I can reference that list whenever something is changed with the schedule.
